title: MIMFlow: Integrating Masked Image Modeling with Normalizing Flows for End-to-End Image Generation
innovation_summary: MIMFlow: Integrating Masked Image Modeling with Normalizing Flows for End-to-End Image Generation: In this paper, we propose MIMFlow, a unified end-to-end framework that jointly optimizes latent semantics, pixel reconstruction, and generative flow.
